title: AWS Recognizer Options
description: AWS Transcribe specific options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'aws'.

accessKey.description: AWS access key ID. Overrides credentials configured in jambonz.

securityToken.description: AWS temporary security token (for STS/assumed roles).

region.description: AWS region for the Transcribe service.

vocabularyName.description: Name of a custom vocabulary to use.

vocabularyFilterName.description: Name of a vocabulary filter to apply.

vocabularyFilterMethod.description: How filtered vocabulary words should be handled.

languageModelName.description: Name of a custom language model.
